name_en: 【Exclusive Photo M48865 Yellow Octagonal Chain/Mini】M25232 This Capucines Mini handbag is crafted from bright Taurillon cowhide, with colorful enamel set into the delicate octagonal chain links, embodying the Art Deco design philosophy. 3D LV letters add a fresh touch. 21 x 14 x 8 cm (Length x Height x Width)
